ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "random_id" TEXT /* Random ID assigned to the participant for anonymity */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition under which the participant is tested (e.g., low, high) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the participant first joined the system */,
  "last_access" TEXT /* Last date the participant accessed the system */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher linked to the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of trial conducted (e.g., choice-task) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment's purpose and methodology */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher linked to the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the trial belongs to */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number of the trial */,
  "sampling_type" TEXT /* Type of sampling (fixed or free) */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean value recorded during the trial */,
  "safe_value" REAL /* Safe value for comparison */,
  "choice" INTEGER /* Choice made by the participant */,
  "stimulus" TEXT /* Stimulus presented in the trial */,
  "stimulus_colour" TEXT /* Color of the stimulus */,
  "rt" INTEGER /* Response time in milliseconds */,
  "trial_index" INTEGER /* Index of the trial within the experiment */,
  "time_elapsed" INTEGER /* Total time elapsed during the trial */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant linked to the trial */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the trial was conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "stimulus_name" TEXT /* Name of the stimulus presented to the participant */,
  "colour" TEXT /* Color associated with the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus (e.g., image, sound) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the stimulus (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "average_rt" REAL /* Average response time across trials */,
  "total_trials" INTEGER /* Total number of trials completed by the participant */,
  "date_calculated" TEXT /* Date when the results were calculated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the condition (e.g., low, high) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant accessing the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the researcher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead, assistant) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the researcher joined the institute */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Last date the researcher was active in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)
